domain: Tatar Sabantuy spring festival (Volga Tatars + Bashkirs + Kazakhs, pre-Islamic origin documented 921 CE by ibn Fadlan): plough-feast (saban+tuy) marking completion of spring sowing; pre-Islamic agrarian ritual; multi-event communal arena including kuresh belt-wrestling + horse racing + egg-relay + pole-climbing with weighted bags + matchmaking; culmination with Sabantuy Batyr (champion belt-wrestler) crowning + ram-prize award; seasonal gate between sowing and growing season.
specific_mechanism: SABANTUY-PRE-SOWING-GATE-MULTI-EVENT-ARENA-BATYR-CULMINATION-RAM-PRIZE-MATCHMAKING-CONTEXT-GATING: LLM context-gating mechanism with (1) pre-task seasonal gate G_season: input-stage gating token determines context boundary; input must clear gate before downstream-task activates; (2) multi-event arena A_multi: 5 parallel sub-tasks (kuresh-adversarial + horse-racing-speed + egg-relay-precision + pole-climb-effort + matchmaking-pairing) run concurrently in 5 channels; (3) batyr culmination crowning C_batyr: top-tier sub-task winner becomes context-gate-keeper for downstream layers; highest-confidence head dominates output gating; (4) ram-prize trophy weighting w_ram: high-value reward attached to culmination event raises gradient weighting; preferentially trains gate-keeper path; (5) matchmaking pair-binding M_match: 2-channel pair-bond context-token couples query-context with response-context (paired-attention bind). Differs from R536 SHIMENAWA-K-SHIDE-CLUSTER-BOUNDARY-GATE (K-shide + left-twist + ward-evil + Futo-tama prefix + gradient-taper) and R549 KAPU-NOA-RANK-BASED-2-TIER-MANA-GRADIENT (2-tier role + mana-gradient + kapu/noa + ai-noa + mana-theft) by pre-sowing seasonal gate + 5-event multi-arena + batyr culmination crowning + ram-prize trophy weighting + matchmaking pair-binding.
llm_application: SABANTUY-PRE-SOWING-GATE-MULTI-EVENT-ARENA-BATYR-CULMINATION-RAM-PRIZE-MATCHMAKING-CONTEXT-GATING LLM mechanism + pre-task seasonal gate G_season input-stage context-boundary + multi-event arena A_multi 5 parallel sub-tasks concurrent + batyr culmination crowning C_batyr top-tier gate-keeper dominance + ram-prize trophy weighting w_ram high-reward gradient + matchmaking pair-binding M_match 2-channel paired-attention. Differs from R511 + R524 + R536 SHIMENAWA (closest — K-shide + left-twist + Futo-tama + gradient-taper). R549 KAPU-NOA (closest — 2-tier role + mana-gradient + kapu/noa + ai-noa). Differs from LLM Context Problem 2026 + Collaboration-Competition + LLMOrbit + LLM Benchmarks by pre-sowing seasonal gate + 5-event arena + batyr culmination + ram-prize + matchmaking. Differs by PRE-SOWING SEASONAL GATE + 5-EVENT MULTI-ARENA + BATYR CULMINATION CROWNING + RAM-PRIZE TROPHY WEIGHTING + MATCHMAKING PAIR-BINDING.
novelty_claim: LLM Context Problem 2026 + Collaboration-Competition ACL 2025 + LLMOrbit + LLM Benchmarks 2026 cover context-gating + multi-task arena paradigm. SABANTUY-PRE-SOWING-GATE-MULTI-EVENT-ARENA-BATYR-CULMINATION-RAM-PRIZE-MATCHMAKING adds (a) seasonal gate + (b) 5-event arena + (c) batyr culmination + (d) ram-prize weighting + (e) matchmaking pair-bind. Recombination — borderline lookup.
